/usr/bin/c++   -pipe -fsigned-char -fsized-deallocation -pthread CMakeFiles/check_time.dir/read_time.cpp.o -o check_time   -L/home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib: /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libCore.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libImt.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libRIO.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libNet.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libHist.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libGraf.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libGraf3d.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libGpad.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libROOTDataFrame.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libTree.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libTreePlayer.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libRint.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libPostscript.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libMatrix.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libPhysics.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libMathCore.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libThread.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libMultiProc.so /home/ribll2026/develop/root/lib/libROOTVecOps.so
